title: mananthes acutangula
intro: Mananthes acutangula, also known as the yellow garcinia, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to tropical Asia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese and Ayurvedic medicine. Mananthes acutangula is valued for its potential health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate digestive issues, skin problems, and fever. The plant is often prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
